title: Bountiful M3H
description: Adds Bounties For M3H's Monsters to Bountiful.
body:
Get Guild Authorisation and Hunt!

This data pack works for compatibility between Monster Hunter: Heaven and Hell and Bountiful's Bounty Boards. By obtaining a Hunter's Guild Decree, your bounty board will provide Small and Large Monsters as objectives for bounties. As your reputation increases, more Large Monsters will be available as objectives.

Monster Hunter: Heaven and Hell: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/monsterhunterheavenandhell](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/monsterhunterheavenandhell)

Bountiful:[https://modrinth.com/mod/bountiful](https://modrinth.com/mod/bountiful)

Note: Rewards can be cheesed because Bountiful generates rewards before objectives. For the best experience, I suggest only using the Guild Decree by itself, and either only taking 1-2 bounties per hunt, or setting the bounty generation in the config for bountiful to a higher value (default is 1 per 45 seconds, I find 600 seconds works).
Alternatively, combining decrees will mix reward pools, allowing for rare items from the others to be achieved through hunts.
